scripts.setup: bun run --filter '@barefootjs/shared' build && bun run --filter '@barefootjs/jsx' build && bun run --filter '@barefootjs/client' build && bun run --filter '@barefootjs/hono' build
scripts.build: bun run ../../packages/cli/src/index.ts build && bun run scripts/build-client.ts
scripts.start: bun run setup && bun run build && bun run server.tsx
